description_long: This is a modern city bus with a streamlined, rectangular body painted in a deep teal color. The bus features large, rectangular windows along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. On the side, there is a prominent 'MOVE SMART' slogan in white, accompanied by Arabic text and a stylized green leaf graphic, suggesting an eco-friendly or smart transit initiative. The front of the bus is equipped with a wide windshield, side mirrors, and headlights, while the rear is more minimal with tail lights and a simple design. The wheels are metallic with visible hubcaps, and the bus appears to have a low-floor design for easy passenger entry. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban public transportation.
description: A sleek, teal city bus with large side windows, 'MOVE SMART' branding, and a modern, eco-friendly design. Features include a wide windshield, metallic wheels, and a low-floor entry.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'MOVE SMART' branding, Arabic text, green leaf graphic, and large rectangular windows.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back panel, tail lights, and the overall width of the bus.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar window arrangement, branding, and green leaf graphic, but with the main passenger door visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the wide windshield, headlights, and side mirrors.
attribute_window_arrangement: Five large, rectangular windows evenly spaced along each side, separated by vertical pillars, with consistent size and shape.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: No visible manufacturer logo; only 'MOVE SMART' branding and Arabic text on the side.
